calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-15-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Sep-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff's Counsel. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-15-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
